concerns.text: FR-001 (System MUST download pre-computed DFT structures...) is covered by T010, but the task description lacks explicit mention of the Materials Project REST API. While implied, a direct reference strengthens traceability.

FR-002 (System MUST parse the high-throughput defect dataset...) is partially covered by T011 and T012, but the task descriptions do not explicitly mention flagging missing values or excluding entries if the DFTB+ fallback fails, as required by the FR.

FR-003 (System MUST normalize all property values...) is covered by T018, but the task description doesn't explicitly mention fetching pristine reference values, which is a critical part of the requirement.
FR-004 (System MUST train random forest regressors...) is covered by T021, but the task description lacks mention of the 80/20 split and seed=42 as specified in the FR.
FR-005 (System MUST apply False Discovery Rate...) is covered by T026, but the task description doesn't explicitly state the FDR control at q ≤ 0.05.
FR-006 (System MUST compute permutation importance...) is covered by T025, but the task description doesn't mention ranking defect descriptor influence.
FR-007 (System MUST perform sensitivity analysis...) is covered by T028, but the task description doesn't explicitly mention sweeping any decision cutoff.
FR-008 (System MUST compute Permutation Importance Stability...) is covered by T030, but the task description doesn't mention flagging collinearity if VIF > 5.
FR-009 (System MUST attempt to validate predictions...) is covered by T031, but the task description doesn't explicitly mention generating the Validation_Report.json with the specified statuses.
FR-010 (System MUST generate a synthetic dataset...) is covered by T012, but the task description doesn't mention the seed=42 or versioning via git hash.
FR-011 (System MUST generate p-values...) is covered by T025, but the task description doesn't explicitly state the 1000 permutations.
FR-012 (System MUST evaluate the final model...) is covered by T024, but the task description doesn't explicitly mention the hold-out set strategy.
FR-013 (System MUST control for confounding...) is covered by T028, but the task description doesn't explicitly mention stratifying or including covariates.
SC-001 (All required variables are either present...) is covered by T016, but the task description doesn't explicitly mention verifying all required fields.
SC-002 (Model predictive performance is measured...) is covered by T022, but the task description doesn't explicitly mention reporting R² and MAPE.
SC-003 (Cross-validation stability is measured...) is covered by T022, but the task description doesn't explicitly mention reporting the standard deviation of R².
SC-004 (Multiple-comparison control is measured...) is covered by T026, but the task description doesn't explicitly mention applying Benjamini-Hochberg FDR control.
SC-005 (Sensitivity analysis completeness is measured...) is covered by T028, but the task description doesn't explicitly mention reporting FPR and FNR variation.
SC-006 (Compute feasibility is measured...) is covered by T033, but the task description doesn't explicitly mention the 6-hour runtime limit.
SC-007 (External validation is measured...) is covered by T031, but the task description doesn't explicitly mention generating the Validation_Report.json with the specified statuses.
